scripts.auth:dev: npm run shared:build && npm run start:dev --workspace=auth
scripts.auth:build: npm run shared:build && npm run build --workspace=auth
scripts.book:dev: npm run shared:build && npm run start:dev --workspace=book
scripts.book:build: npm run shared:build && npm run build --workspace=book
scripts.notification:dev: npm run shared:build && npm run start:dev --workspace=notification
scripts.notification:build: npm run shared:build && npm run build --workspace=notification
scripts.order:dev: npm run shared:build && npm run start:dev --workspace=order
scripts.order:build: npm run shared:build && npm run build --workspace=order
scripts.review:dev: npm run shared:build && npm run start:dev --workspace=review
scripts.review:build: npm run shared:build && npm run build --workspace=review
scripts.dev:all: npm run shared:build && (npm run auth:dev & npm run book:dev & npm run notification:dev & npm run order:dev & npm run review:dev)
scripts.build:all: npm run shared:build && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
